name: Local Memory Search
description: Read-only search over shared LanceDB index: hybrid/semantic/keyword retrieval, context packs, call/import graph, diagnostics. Falls back to keyword/SQLite when vectors or embeddings unavailable.
prohibitions: Must never write to LanceDB (no add, update, delete, create_index).
Must never write to the SQLite state database (read-only, PRAGMA query_only).
Must never write to the filesystem; source files are read-only for neighbor line expansion.
Must never build or query a cross-project global index.
Must never return a 500-equivalent internal error to the agent; always degrade to a usable result set.
Tool names, required parameters, and the output envelope shape are frozen from v1.0 and must not change without a version bump.
